economic_notes: Nation has two government business enterprises: Red Pheasant Cree Nation Developments GP Corporation and Red Pheasant Centex Operations GP Corp. Also holds investments in BATC Investments Ltd. and Miskisiw Oilfield Services Ltd.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023. Three fully consolidated subsidiaries: Red Pheasant Cree Nation Administration, Red Pheasant Cree Nation Education Inc., and Red Pheasant Cree Nation Housing Authority. Two GBEs on modified equity basis: Red Pheasant Cree Nation Developments GP Corporation and Red Pheasant Centex Operations GP Corp. Ottawa Trust revenue of $126,000 included in revenue lines but net trust activity resulted in decrease of restricted Ottawa Trust balance. Contingent liabilities of $500,000-$800,000 from legal claim against Red Pheasant Education Inc. No schedule of remuneration for chief and council was included in the financial statements provided. First Nation Programs segment shows large deficit of $4,047,712 due to significant community support expenditures. Capital Projects segment shows large surplus of $2,060,405 due to ISC funding exceeding expenditures. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($19,642,892) plus CMHC ($179,997) = $19,822,889.
